docs.description: Project documentation — API docs, architecture, and decisions

backend.description: Express API server source — routes, services, repositories, middleware

frontend.description: React frontend source — components, features, hooks, providers, routes

packages.description: Shared monorepo packages — types, constants, validation, utils, config

schema.description: Prisma database schema, migrations, and seed data

dev.template: Run all dev servers with pnpm dev

dev:api.template: Run the API dev server with pnpm dev:api

dev:web.description: Start the frontend dev server only
dev:web.template: Run the frontend dev server with pnpm dev:web

build.description: Build packages. Optionally filter: /build api, /build web

lint.description: Run ESLint. Optionally filter: /lint api, /lint web

typecheck.description: Run TypeScript type checking. Optionally filter: /typecheck api, /typecheck web

test.description: Run tests. Optionally filter: /test api, /test web

format.template: Format all source files: pnpm format

prisma.description: Run Prisma commands (generate, migrate, studio, seed)
